# BP-101 negative variant: a non-HTTP writer must not be treated as a handler response.
lang: go
file: BP-101-variant-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func writeDocument(out io.Writer, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	out.Write([]byte("document"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
